Our Services

How We Can Help

Whether you’re looking for someone to talk to, practical support for your farm, connection while working away, or ways to strengthen your community — we’re here.

Our Four Pillars

Supporting Your Wellbeing

Someone to talk to, and a hand finding the right support.

Find out more

Supporting Farm Life

Practical support and connection for farming families.

Find out more

Supporting Those Who Work Away

Support for offshore, rotational, and remote workers -- and their families.

Find out more

Strengthening Our Community

Events, volunteering, and ways to build a stronger local community.

Find out more

What happens when you get in touch

It’s simpler than you think

  1. 1

    You call or fill in our form

  2. 2

    We’ll have a friendly conversation to understand how we can help

  3. 3

    We’ll suggest the right support for you

  4. 4

    You’re in control — no pressure, completely confidential

Get in Touch

Not sure where to start?

That’s completely fine. Get in touch and we’ll help you find the right support.

Get in Touch

St Katharine Rural Connect

Support, connection, and care for rural communities
